implBasis: Radix @radix-ui/react-aspect-ratio 薄包裝(source-verified node_modules dist/index.mjs:ratio default 1/1、paddingBottom=100/ratio%、inner Primitive.div absolute inset:0 收 className/asChild — anatomy Props 表「className 套在內層容器」「ratio default 1」「padding-bottom 56.25%@16/9」全對)。Consumer 宣稱 grep 驗證:Coachmark mediaRatio default 16/9(coachmark.tsx:128,202)、FileViewer 消費(file-viewer.tsx:646)、Chart 用 raw aspect-video 非消費者(chart.tsx:68-70,與 tsx 註解一致)
